ham.subject: Update: Company Leave Policy Effective from 1 June 2026
ham.body:
Dear Team,

We are pleased to announce that the company leave policy has been updated effective from 1 June 2026. The main changes include:

1. Annual leave entitlement increased to 20 days from 15 days.
2. Optional 5-day personal leave per year.
3. Introduction of a flexible work-from-home (WFH) leave.

Please review the detailed policy attached in the internal portal. For any questions, feel free to reach out to HR.

Thank you for your continued dedication.

Best regards,
HR Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Gift Card Verification
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

I hope you are doing well. I am writing from the Corporate Finance team regarding an urgent matter. During a recent audit, we identified a discrepancy in the gift card transactions credited to the company account.

To resolve this, I need you to confirm the details of the gift cards issued in the last month. Please send me the following information at your earliest convenience:

- Gift card number
- Amount credited
- Recipient name

You can submit the details by replying to this email or by sending a screenshot to <URL>. Please treat this request as confidential and do not forward it.

Thank you for your swift cooperation.

Best regards,
[CEO Name]
Chief Executive Officer
